'''Vinian Ska''' was a renowned [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quermian/Legends|Quermian]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the final days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quermian/Legends|Quermian]], Vinian Ska was from his [[Species/Legends|species's]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Quermia/Legends|Quermia]]. After being inducted into the ranks of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Ska was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and over time attained the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="NEGAS" />

A noted [[Telepathy/Legends|telepath]] among the ranks of the Jedi, Ska's influence among the Jedi was dwarfed by fellow Quermian and [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Councilor]], Master [[Yarael Poof/Legends|Yarael Poof]]. Poof served on the Council during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], which caused strife among the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], and in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]] sacrificed his life to end a threat against Coruscant devised by the terrorist [[Ashaar Khorda]]. Along with [[Kindee Ya]] and [[Loo Raelo]], Ska attended the [[Funeral of Yarael Poof|funeral]] of Master Poof high within the Temple's [[Jedi Temple Pyre room|pyre room]].<ref name="NEGAS" />
